name: DrugSafetyAnalyzer
description: Comprehensive drug safety analysis combining adverse event data, literature review, and molecular information

drug_name.description: Name of the drug to analyze

serious_events_only.description: Focus only on serious adverse events

name: ToolDescriptionOptimizer
description: Optimizes a tool's description and parameter descriptions by generating test cases, executing them, analyzing the results, and suggesting improved descriptions for both the tool and its arguments. Optionally saves a comprehensive optimization report to a file without overwriting the original.

tool_config.description: The full configuration of the tool to optimize.

save_to_file.description: If true, save the optimized description to a file (do not overwrite the original).

output_file.description: Optional file path to save the optimized description. If not provided, use '<tool_name>_optimized_description.txt'.

max_iterations.description: Maximum number of optimization rounds to perform.

satisfaction_threshold.description: Quality score threshold (1-10) to consider optimization satisfactory.

name: ToolDiscover
description: Generates new ToolUniverse-compliant tools based on short descriptions through an intelligent discovery and refinement process. Automatically determines the optimal tool type and category, discovers similar existing tools, generates initial specifications, and iteratively refines the tool configuration using agentic optimization tools until it meets quality standards.

tool_description.description: Short description of the desired tool functionality and purpose. Tool Discover will automatically analyze this to determine the optimal tool type (PackageTool, RESTTool, XMLTool, or AgenticTool) and appropriate category.

max_iterations.description: Maximum number of refinement iterations to perform.

save_to_file.description: Whether to save the generated tool configuration and report to a file.

output_file.description: Optional file path to save the generated tool. If not provided, uses auto-generated filename.

name: LiteratureSearchTool
description: Comprehensive literature search and summary tool that searches multiple databases (EuropePMC, OpenAlex, PubTator) and generates AI-powered summaries of research findings

research_topic.description: The research topic or query to search for in the literature

name: ComprehensiveDrugDiscoveryPipeline
description: Complete end-to-end drug discovery workflow from disease to optimized candidates. Identifies targets, discovers lead compounds, screens for ADMET properties, assesses safety, and validates with literature.

disease_efo_id.description: The EFO ID of the disease for drug discovery (e.g., 'EFO_0001074' for Alzheimer's disease)

name: BiomarkerDiscoveryWorkflow
description: Discover and validate biomarkers for a specific disease condition using literature analysis, expression data, pathway enrichment, and clinical validation.

disease_condition.description: The disease condition to discover biomarkers for (e.g., 'breast cancer', 'Alzheimer's disease')

sample_type.description: The type of sample to analyze (e.g., 'blood', 'tissue', 'plasma')

name: ToolMetadataGenerationPipeline
description: Generates standardized metadata for a batch of ToolUniverse tool configurations by calling ToolMetadataGenerator, LabelGenerator, and ToolMetadataStandardizer for sources and tags.

tool_configs.description: List of raw tool configuration JSON objects to extract and standardize metadata for

tool_type_mappings.description: Mapping of simplified toolType (keys) to lists of tool 'type' values belonging to each simplified category (e.g., {'Databases': ['XMLTool']})

add_existing_tooluniverse_labels.description: Whether to include labels from existing ToolUniverse tools when labeling the metadata configs of the new tools. It is strongly recommended that this is set to true to minimize the number of new labels created and the possibility of redundant labels.

max_new_tooluniverse_labels.description: The maximum number of new ToolUniverse labels to use in the metadata configs of the new tools. The existing ToolUniverse labels will be used first, and then new labels will be created as needed up to this limit. If the limit is reached, the least relevant new labels will be discarded. Please try to use as few new labels as possible to avoid excessive labels.

name: ToolGraphGenerationPipeline
description: Generates a directed tool relationship graph among provided tool configs using ToolRelationshipDetector to infer data-flow compatibility.

max_tools.description: Optional max number of tools to process (debug)

name: HarvestAutoRegistrar
description: Discover, validate, and register new verified-source tools by chaining GenericHarvestTool, HarvestCandidateTesterTool, and VerifiedSourceRegisterTool. Optionally runs the newly registered tool.

query.description: Search query passed to GenericHarvestTool when no explicit candidates are provided.

limit.description: Maximum number of harvest candidates to inspect.

harvest.description: Additional arguments forwarded to GenericHarvestTool (e.g., urls, description, domain filters).

candidates.description: Optional pre-harvested candidates to evaluate instead of calling GenericHarvestTool.

tester.description: Overrides passed to HarvestCandidateTesterTool (e.g., default headers or params).

register.description: Overrides passed to VerifiedSourceRegisterTool (e.g., default headers, params, tool_type).

tool_name.description: Desired name for the registered tool. Automatically generated if omitted.

force_register.description: Register the tool even if validation fails (mirrors the force flag on VerifiedSourceRegisterTool).

skip_tests.description: Skip HarvestCandidateTesterTool and proceed straight to registration.

auto_run.description: Invoke the registered tool immediately after successful registration.

tool_arguments.description: Arguments forwarded to the registered tool when auto_run is true.

name: DockerLLMProvisioner
description: Launch a Docker-hosted LLM MCP server, wait for readiness, and register client/auto-loader configurations so the model appears inside ToolUniverse.

container_name.description: Optional container name. Generated automatically when omitted.

host_port.description: Port exposed on the host for MCP traffic (default 9000).

container_port.description: Internal container port that serves MCP (default 8000).

env.description: Environment variables to pass to docker run.

extra_args.description: Additional arguments appended to docker run.

tool_name.description: Tool name registered within ToolUniverse (default DockerLLMChat).

tool_prefix.description: Prefix applied when auto-registering tools from the MCP server.

mcp_tool_name.description: Underlying MCP tool name exposed by the server (default docker_llm_chat).

timeout_seconds.description: Seconds to wait for the container to become healthy.

poll_interval.description: Seconds between health checks during provisioning.

reuse_container.description: Reuse and restart an existing container if present (default true).

server_url.description: Override MCP base URL if different from http://host:host_port.

description.description: Custom description applied to the registered tool.
